textByHash.1fb6c4ce74dbc06a4d57157369ec81a6e51da735: Indeed it is, my child. That is why it is our duty to ensure the ents are protected. The events of the war cannot be repeated.
textByHash.278e6279b60363acb85ab02bbdcb5a20b510cdd0: Much of the valley was destroyed during the war. Most of what you see around you was regrown by the ents.
textByHash.3927f0d60a19081228b82b88cb84233873faa9d0: That is beyond our understanding. We believe they are here to guide the ents that live in the valley so that they may one day regrow the Great Auburn Redwood.
textByHash.6377ac6370058a6e5e2449d194a471c69d81edd5: This stump is all that remains of the Great Auburn Redwood. It was, and in many ways still is, one of the key holy sites of Varlamore.
textByHash.87339d100c0b2ff457c38074a2ba45ded7ea5097: Yes. They are the spirits of the animals that died here during the War of Betrayal. They did not pass on to Mictl, for they have unfinished business in these lands.
textByHash.904a027bc0b63cfb01b107dd83da2323390c1cf3: That has never been clear. Ranul teaches us to find and preserve the truth, but in war, the truth is sadly left behind.
textByHash.a3214aa3c7d0d050a1ad8268fbf71dc4b7e3d135: I would suggest you speak to my counterpart instead. Those of us dedicated to Ranul do not specialise in that sort of thing.
textByHash.abd2d45d581942bf25e360d60572dbf49d5fef0a: The tree was destroyed during the War of Betrayal many years ago. It was here in the Auburn Valley that the fighting was at its most fierce.
textByHash.e14a3ddb4273ed3955ca0d9527f9225e411ce9c4: Both sides resorted to tactics that most would consider to be beyond horrifying. The tree was sadly a casualty of such tactics.
textByHash.e7052ad05fd298f581728d340a5effdb9ba3135b: Then go in peace, my child.
textByHash.efaaacc7809348d13137936d7996f436e0a67719: Nilsal. Is there something I can do for you, my child?
